decisions.decision: TypeScript throughout — all source files use .ts/.tsx.
decisions.rationale: Seeded locked decision from stack guidance.

decisions.decision: Next.js 14 App Router. All page and layout files live under app/. Client-interactive components are marked 'use client'.
decisions.rationale: Seeded locked decision from stack guidance. App Router is confirmed. HistoryTable is a pure client component (no async server data), making it fully compatible with Vitest + jsdom.

decisions.decision: Vitest + React Testing Library (@testing-library/react) + jsdom as the test environment.
decisions.rationale: Vitest is the confirmed test runner. React Testing Library is the standard companion for component tests. jsdom allows DOM assertions in a Node environment. Components must be 'use client' to be mountable in jsdom.
